meaning: 亭可马里[斯里兰卡东北部港市]
examples: Now they no longer pose a threat to another, Trincomalee.
Trincomalee, Sri Lanka: Fishermen carry their catch to shore.
Tamil Tiger rebels have sunk a Sri Lankan naval cargo ship in the eastern border of Trincomalee, hours before voting began in key provincial elections.
The same day, and again on Wednesday, airforce planes supported by naval artillery pulverised rebel positions near the northern port of Trincomalee.
The latest round of fighting started as a spat over the waters of a small river in the eastern district of Trincomalee.
